direct_collaborator_permission_probe.interpretation: The token cannot use this admin-oriented collaborator endpoint here, or the access comes through an organization/team relationship rather than a directly visible collaborator record. The repository permissions object and GraphQL viewerPermission are the usable evidence for this token.

conclusion.reason: The account has read/pull access only. Direct branches require push/write access, and private fork creation is blocked because allow_forking is false.
